prompt: I need a LinkedIn DM to Sarah Chen, VP of Revenue Operations at Datawise Analytics (Series B, 180 employees, sells a BI platform to mid-market finance teams). She posted on LinkedIn two days ago about...
assertions: Output contains a Five Laws check section with all five laws explicitly verified: specific reference, lead with them, one ask, word count, and banned language
Message body is 100 words or fewer (LinkedIn DM channel limit)
First sentence of the message body references Sarah Chen's LinkedIn post or her team's achievement -- does not begin with 'We', 'I', 'My company', 'RevStack', or any sender-focused language
Message contains exactly one CTA: a 15-minute call -- no alternative asks, no vague 'let me know if interested', no multiple options

Message body contains none of the banned words: leverage, synergy, best-in-class, seamless, robust, solution, game-changing, revolutionary, disruptive, holistic, end-to-end, cutting-edge, world-class, innovative, empower, unlock, transform
Output includes both a Day 3 follow-up variant (different angle, not 'just checking in') and a Day 7 follow-up variant (shorter, single question format)
